scripts.backend:setup: uv sync --project backend && uv run --no-sync --project backend python scripts/setup-backend-runtime.py
scripts.backend:dev: npm run backend:ensure && npm run backend:config && uv run --no-sync --project backend uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8787 --reload --reload-dir backend/app
scripts.backend:format: uv run --no-sync --project backend ruff format backend/app scripts backend/tests
scripts.backend:format:check: uv run --no-sync --project backend ruff format --check backend/app scripts backend/tests
scripts.backend:lint: uv run --no-sync --project backend ruff check backend/app scripts backend/tests
scripts.backend:check: uv run --no-sync --project backend python scripts/check-backend-runtime.py && uv run --no-sync --project backend python -m compileall backend/app scripts
scripts.ci: npm run backend:format:check && npm run backend:lint && npm run check && npm run backend:setup && npm run backend:check && npm run backend:test && npm run build
